title: Lead Product Manager - Return & Refund (AI Strategies), Regional Operations
description:
Job Description:

  • Understand business direction and objectives, align priorities and requirements with business teams and local markets, and translate them into product strategies and solutions.

  • Lead and mentor a team of product managers to deliver AI strategies and build AI platforms for automated Return & Refund request and dispute adjudication, improving accuracy, efficiency, and overall operational cost effectiveness.

  • Drive initiatives to optimise AI strategies for buyer and seller credibility assessment, as well as detection of fraudulent behaviours related to Return & Refund.

  • Oversee AI model development, integration, testing, and iteration across different AI applications supporting Return & Refund judgement and evaluation.

  • Deep dive into operational workflows to understand end-to-end business ecosystems

  • Develop effective tools and platforms to support local operations, particularly in Return & Refund judgement and policy configuration.

  • Own the full product development lifecycle and collaborate closely with designers, analysts, frontend/backend engineers, and data scientists to deliver high-impact product solutions; facilitate cross-functional alignment across product and engineering teams.


Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in any discipline

  • Minimally 5 years of total working experience, excluding internships

  • Minimally 2 years of technical product management, technical program management, or analytics-heavy product experience

  • Prior experience involving AI-enabled or automation-driven product is a plus

  • Prior team management experience is a plus

  • Excellent problem-solving skills, critical thinking abilities and data-driven decision-making mindsets  

  • Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with technical and non-technical team members

  • Adaptable, open-minded, and thrives in a dynamic environment

  • Proactive, self-motivated, and with a strong ownership mentality.

postedCompany.description: Shopee is the leading e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan. Launched in 2015, it is a platform tailored for the region, providing customers with an easy, secure and fast online shopping experience through strong payment and fulfillment support. We believe online shopping should be accessible, easy and enjoyable. This is the vision Shopee aspires to deliver on the platform, every single day.
postedCompany.name: SHOPEE SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
